# Transcrição: 09-Abraham Heisler

- **Fonte:** 09-Abraham Heisler
- **Duração:** 01:16
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:16]

What's up everybody? I'm Abraham Heisler. I'm a speaker here at Mastermind. I also for a long time was a strategy consultant, meaning that I met with members of the community and helped them to figure out what is the best, most clearest, most most efficient path to get to where they want to go. Why do I do this? Why am I here? I've struggled my entire life with believing in myself, feeling empowered that I have what it takes, what I need in order to overcome certain challenges. I mean, my core wound is I'm not good enough. And at a certain point in my life, I learned certain things. I had mentors. I had people that by the grace of whatever the universe reached out and said, Hey, here are some tools, here are some strategies or just held space for me. And it just became very clear to me at a certain point that this is exactly what I want to do for other people is I want to inspire and I want to empower people. I know it's it's not the most comfortable journey in the world. In fact, miracles never happen inside your comfort zone. You have to get uncomfortable in order to make something happen. But I tell you, when you look back, it's all worth it. And I'm super excited to share this journey with you.
